footer.tagline: Protecting wildlife by empowering communities across Kenya's Amboseli ecosystem and beyond.
footer.rights: Luigi Footprints Foundation. All rights reserved.
footer.motto: Protecting Wildlife. Empowering Communities. Inspiring Change.

projects.fallbackMeta: A field project by The Luigi Footprints Foundation.

getInvolved.seedlingImpact: Plants 10 indigenous trees in the Olchani nursery
getInvolved.scholarImpact: Funds a full school term kit for one student
getInvolved.guardianImpact: Equips a community conservation ranger for one month
getInvolved.stewardImpact: Sustains a Maasai women's enterprise for one full season
